items.title: Why Pearson φ Fails for Tweedie Pure Premiums (and How Bayesian PPC Fixes It)
items.content_html: Why Pearson's chi-square dispersion estimator inflates φ by 7× for zero-inflated Tweedie pure premium models and how Bayesian posterior predictive checks fix model validation.

items.title: Project-Level IPython Startup Scripts
items.content_html: Tired of re-importing the same modules every time you open IPython? Here's how I use project-level startup scripts to jump straight into analysis.

items.title: My Favorite Python builtin: pathlib
items.content_html: A look at the pathlib module in the Python standard library and how it can be used to work with files and paths in a more intuitive and object-oriented way.

items.title: Pydantic for Configs
items.content_html: Learn how to use Pydantic to create structured, validated, and reusable configuration files for your Python projects.

items.title: MkDocs and GitHub Pages
items.content_html: A guide to setting up a personal website using MkDocs, mkdocs-material, and GitHub Pages, including configuration and deployment details.

items.title: Conjugate Priors
items.content_html: An introduction to conjugate priors in Bayesian statistics, explaining what they are, why they are useful, and how they can be applied to data analysis problems.

items.title: Strategy Pattern for Flexible Solutions
items.content_html: Learn how the Strategy design pattern was applied in `pymc-marketing` to create a flexible solution for various Marketing Mix Model (MMM) saturation and adstock functions.

items.title: Debugging with pytest
items.content_html: Discover how the `--pdb` flag in pytest can be a game-changer for debugging Python tests, allowing you to drop into a debugger when a test fails.

items.title: Working within Docker container
items.content_html: A step-by-step guide on how to work interactively within a Docker container, while still using your local machine for editing files.

items.title: Extending Pandas
items.content_html: Learn how to extend Pandas DataFrames with custom accessors to add new functionality and promote more readable and organized code.

items.title: Iteration Pattern
items.content_html: Explore the iteration pattern in Python, learning how to leverage generators and `__iter__`/`__next__` methods to create flexible and generalized code for processing data.

items.title: Automate marimo Notebook Documentation
items.content_html: A guide to automating documentation generation using Marimo notebooks and GitHub Actions, providing an alternative to MkDocs for WASM-powered HTML documentation.
